title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Origanum majorana, also known as sweet marjoram, essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural antiseptic and astringent properties. The oil's ability to balance the scalp's pH levels reduces sebum production, thereby controlling oiliness. Additionally, sweet marjoram essential oil's antifungal properties help combat scalp infections that can lead to excessive oiliness.
